page_metadata.biotools__summary: General Image Fiber Tool (GIFT) is an ImageJ macro tool which allows the users to measure the average diameter of electrospun fibers in scanning electron microscopy (SEM) images.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: General Image Fiber Tool (GIFT) is an ImageJ macro tool which allows the users to measure the average diameter of electrospun fibers in scanning electron microscopy (SEM) images.
